title: keyfile: decrypt_keyfile returns plain [u8;64] instead of Zeroizing<[u8;64]>
description: decrypt_keyfile (core/src/keyfile.rs:51) returns Result<[u8;64]>. Internally it wraps the payload in Zeroizing<[u8;64]> and then dereferences it before returning (Ok(*seed)), copying the key bytes out as a plain array. Callers must manually call .zeroize() or risk leaving 64 bytes of Ed25519+HPKE seed material on the stack. Both current callers (load_identity, cli/commands.rs) do zeroize correctly, but the public API type gives no indication this is required. Change return type to Result<Zeroizing<[u8;64]>> so the compiler enforces cleanup.
